title: The Learn-It-All Educator
text:
Note



Machajewski, Szymon. (2026). The Learn-It-All Educator — A Guidebook for Training Brains, Not Replacing Them with AI. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19041123

This copy is hosted in preparation for an elective course on Generative AI som finurlig kognitiv partner at the Danish School of Education (DPU), Aarhus University, Denmark.
